text_block_list.text: After the Arima Kinen...

text_block_list.name: Narita Brian
text_block_list.text: ...It's over.

text_block_list.name: Hishi Amazon
text_block_list.text: Brian!

text_block_list.name: Hishi Amazon
text_block_list.text:
How'd you let it slip from your reach?! First place
should've been easy for you!

text_block_list.name: Hishi Amazon
text_block_list.text:
You are seriously the strongest! And that's why I
never let myself lose either...

text_block_list.name: Hishi Amazon
text_block_list.text:
That's what kept me going, giving it my best up
till now!

text_block_list.name: Narita Brian
text_block_list.text: ...Amazon.

text_block_list.name: Hishi Amazon
text_block_list.text:
Why'd you lose?! You were always just out of my
reach...

text_block_list.name: Narita Brian
text_block_list.text: Quit your crying!

text_block_list.name: Narita Brian
text_block_list.text: Accept it. My results and your own.

text_block_list.name: Narita Brian
text_block_list.text:
But don't you think for a second that this is it for
me.

text_block_list.name: Narita Brian
text_block_list.text:
I'm going to keep racing, just like any other racer
who's come this far in the Classics would.

text_block_list.name: Narita Brian
text_block_list.text:
Even if I stumble, I'll get back on my feet and
fight. Just like you would.

text_block_list.name: Narita Brian
text_block_list.text: So don't you dare look down on me.

text_block_list.name: Narita Brian
choice_data_list: I wonder if that could've been phrased better...
I wonder if that could've been phrased better...

text_block_list.name: Narita Brian
text_block_list.text: That's how you have to say it with her.

text_block_list.name: Narita Brian
text_block_list.text:
I don't want to be anyone's idol. I just want to be
known as a relentless racer.

text_block_list.name: Narita Brian
text_block_list.text:
I'll show everyone that I'm going to get stronger
and faster—enough to leave today's version of
myself in the dust.

text_block_list.name: Narita Brian
text_block_list.text: So there's no time for taking it easy.

text_block_list.name: Narita Brian
text_block_list.text:
Come to think of it, it's been quite the year.
Challenging the Classic Triple Crown, learning
everyone's strengths, and forging my own...

text_block_list.name: Narita Brian
text_block_list.text:
And yet, the final victory slipped through my
fingers.

text_block_list.name: Narita Brian
text_block_list.text:
...Unbelievable. There's never a dull moment in
the Twinkle Series.

text_block_list.name: Narita Brian
text_block_list.text:
Let's bring the pain next year. I'm prepared to
crawl my way out from the depths of hell if that's
what it takes.
choice_data_list:
What race do you want to shoot for in the
beginning of the year?

text_block_list.name: Narita Brian
text_block_list.text: You choose.

text_block_list.name: Narita Brian
text_block_list.text:
I'm happy as long as you pick somewhere I can
get stronger. In the least amount of time.

Next year is her senior year. Maybe competing
with the most elite racers would be a good
experience for her.

The prestigious shield award awaits in the spring
Tenno Sho. But first, I'd like to see how the
Hanshin Daishoten goes, as it's often considered
a preliminary.

text_block_list.name: Narita Brian
text_block_list.text: ...Sure.

text_block_list.name: Narita Brian
text_block_list.text: Just let me run more and more.
